name: Heath Bar Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup graham cracker pie crust (for a 9-inch pie)
6 Heath candy bars, chopped (about 1 to 1 1/2 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the caramel ice cream topping evenly over the bottom of the pie crust.
2. In a bowl, beat together the milk and vanilla pudding mix for about 2 minutes until smooth.
3. Let the pudding mixture stand for 5 minutes, then stir in the whipped topping and chopped Heath candy bars until well combined.
4. Pour the pudding mixture into the pie crust, spreading it evenly.
5. Freeze the pie for at least 4 hours or until set.
6. Before serving, allow the pie to sit at room temperature for about 15 minutes so it can be easily cut.
7. Store any leftovers in the refrigerator.
